21.gl: properly, to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve; figuratively, to profane (a person, place or thing), to break (one's word), to begin (as if by an 'opening wedge'); to play (the flute)
21.kj: begin ([idiom] men began), defile, [idiom] break, defile, [idiom] eat (as common things), [idiom] first, [idiom] gather the grape thereof, [idiom] take inheritance, pipe, player on
21.dv: a primitive root (compare H2470 (חָלָה)); also  denominative (from H2485 (חָלִיל))

21.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
21.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

21.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
21.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

21.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
21.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

22.kj: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
22.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

22.gl: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
22.kj: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.

22.gl: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol
22.dv: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);

22.gl: properly, remembered, i.e. a male (of man or animals, as being the most noteworthy sex)
a bed (figuratively, a bier); abstractly, sleep; by euphemism, carnal intercourse

23.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
23.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
23.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

23.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
23.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

23.gl: to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive)
23.kj: abide (behind), appoint, arise, cease, confirm, continue, dwell, be employed, endure, establish, leave, make, ordain, be (over), place, (be) present (self), raise up, remain, repai
(adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
23.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

23.gl: to be foul, especially in a ceremial or moral sense (contaminated)
23.kj: defile (self), pollute (self), be (make, make self, pronounce) unclean, [idiom] utterly.

23.gl: properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective)
23.dv: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute);

24.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
24.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
24.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

24.gl: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
24.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put

24.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
24.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

24.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
24.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

24.gl: to be foul, especially in a ceremial or moral sense (contaminated)
24.kj: defile (self), pollute (self), be (make, make self, pronounce) unclean, [idiom] utterly.
an-(the) other; one sort, so, some, such, them, these (same), they, this, those, thus, which, who(-m).

25.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
25.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

25.gl: to visit (with friendly or hostile intent); by analogy, to oversee, muster, charge, care for, miss, deposit, etc.
25.kj: appoint, [idiom] at all, avenge, bestow, (appoint to have the, give a) charge, commit, count, deliver to keep, be empty, enjoin, go see, hurt, do judgment, lack, lay up, look, make

25.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
25.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
25.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

25.gl: to be foul, especially in a ceremial or moral sense (contaminated)
25.kj: defile (self), pollute (self), be (make, make self, pronounce) unclean, [idiom] utterly.
fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.
25.dv: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);

26.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
26.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

26.gl: properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the cr
26.kj: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of)

26.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
26.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

26.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
26.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

26.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
26.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

26.gl: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre
26.kj: among(-st), [idiom] between, half, [idiom] (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), [idiom] out (of), [idiom] through, [idiom] with(-in).
26.dv: from an unused root meaning to sever;

27.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

27.gl: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol

29.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
29.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

29.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
29.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

29.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)
29.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

29.gl: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
29.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

29.gl: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol
29.dv: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);

29.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

30.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
30.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
30.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

30.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
30.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

30.gl: properly, a failure of, i.e. (used only as a negative particle, usually with a prepositional prefix) not, except, without, unless, besides, because not, until, etc.
30.kj: because un(satiable), beside, but, [phrase] continual, except, from, lest, neither, no more, none, not, nothing, save, that no, without.
30.dv: constructive feminine of H1086 (בָּלָה) (equivalent to H1097 (בְּלִי));

30.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
30.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

30.gl: watch, i.e. the act (custody), or (concretely) the sentry, the post; objectively preservation, or (concretely) safe; figuratively observance, i.e. (abstractly) duty or (objectively) a usage or party
30.kj: charge, keep, or to be kept, office, ordinace, safeguard, ward, watch.

30.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
30.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).
